description.value:
All known copies are handwritten by the seer Carnamagos in the Tsath-Yo script of Hyperborea around 10,000 B.C., though a Greek translation is rumored to have been created in the kingdom of Bactria over three hundred years ago. Copies are preserved as enormous two-foot-wide scrolls of vellum from an unidentifiable animal. These scrolls accumulate dust unnaturally fast—an ominous warning. Collects Carnamagos' visions of both future and past, with emphasis on time, death, and decay. The only known tome addressing the Great Old One Quachil Uttaus.

LanguageHyperborean
AuthorCarnamagos (Cimmerian oracle)
Datec. 10,000 B.C.
Sanity Loss1D10
Cthulhu Mythos+3/+7 percentiles
Mythos Rating30
Study (weeks)32

Spells Contained

  • Apportion Ka
  • Call Slithering Shadows (Summon/Bind Formless Spawn of Tsathoggua)
  • Call Unseen Horror (Summon/Bind Star Vampire)
  • Create Sign of Barzai
  • Pact of Quachil Uttaus
  • Touch of Quachil Uttaus (Wither Limb)
